pub fn divide(a: i64, b: i64) -> i64 {
    if b == 0 {
        panic!("division by zero");
    }
    a / b
}

pub fn parse_port(s: &str) -> u16 {
    let port: u16 = s.parse().unwrap_or_else(|_| {
        panic!("invalid port number: {s}");
    });
    if port == 0 {
        panic!("port must be non-zero");
    }
    port
}

pub fn get_config_value(key: &str) -> String {
    match std::env::var(key) {
        Ok(val) => val,
        Err(_) => panic!("required environment variable {key} is not set"),
    }
}
